description: This file implements an AWS Lambda authorizer for API Gateway, including JWT validation, IAM policy generation, and STS credential assumption. It defines classes for policy creation and handles tenant-specific API key selection.

classes.name: HttpVerb
classes.description: Class defining constants for HTTP verbs used in API Gateway policies.

classes.name: AuthPolicy
classes.description: Class for constructing IAM policies for API Gateway authorization, including methods to add allowed/denied methods and generate policy documents.

methods.name: lambda_handler
methods.description: Main AWS Lambda handler function that processes authorization requests, validates JWT tokens, and generates IAM policies with temporary credentials.

methods.name: isTenantAuthorizedForThisAPI
methods.description: Function to verify if a tenant is authorized for a specific API Gateway URL.
